ownedDrafts.title: London is playable
ownedDrafts.hook: London has more playable space than people think.
ownedDrafts.marketingAngle: Outdoor play is becoming a better answer to screen-only social games.
script: Text: London is not just where the game happens.
Text: The streets, parks, and open routes change the strategy.
VO: Three players. One moving triangle. Real-world decisions.
VO: Find the next Triangulate session: https://triangulate.live/events.html.
ownedDrafts.caption: London has parks, routes, corners, and sightlines. Triangulate turns them into a team game. https://triangulate.live/events.html

ownedDrafts.title: The group chat can leave the chat
ownedDrafts.hook: Some games are better when everyone has to actually move.
ownedDrafts.marketingAngle: Current game talk keeps circling back to maps, places, and real-world context.
script: Text: The group chat can leave the chat.
Text: Pick a public space in London.
Text: Form a triangle. Hold the shape. Outthink nearby teams.
Text: Triangulate is real-world team play.
ownedDrafts.caption: A mobile game for people who want the plan, the sprint, and the laugh afterwards. Built for real spaces around London. https://triangulate.live/events.html

ownedDrafts.title: What is Triangulate?
ownedDrafts.hook: This is a mobile game, but the map is real.
script: Scene 1: Three points appear over a park.
VO: Three people form one triangle.
Scene 2: The triangle stretches across paths.
VO: You move together, hold the shape, and outplay nearby teams.
Scene 3: Events page at https://triangulate.live/events.html.
ownedDrafts.caption: Three points. One triangle. Real-world play.
ownedDrafts.assetBrief: Fast rule explainer with animated triangle lines and map-style captions.

ownedDrafts.title: How the triangle works
slides: Join an event or start one nearby.
Bigger, smarter triangles beat smaller ones.
ownedDrafts.caption: Easy to explain. Hard to play well.
